channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: CDC expands Ebola screening to Atlanta and Dulles airports amid Congo outbreak concerns
item.description: The US Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) has expanded enhanced Ebola screening measures to include Hartsfield-Jackson Atlanta International Airport, adding a second entry point for Amer...

item.title: Tanzania Reviews Education Act to Align with New Education Policy Through 2028
item.description: The Government of Tanzania is continuing with major education reforms through a comprehensive review of the Education Act of 1978, aiming to align the law with the country’s newly launched education p...

item.title: Vice Ganda receives heartfelt message from former supporter during 'Everybody Sing'
item.description: In a recent episode of the ABS-CBN musical game show 'Everybody Sing', Asia’s Unkabogable Superstar Vice Ganda experienced an emotional moment after receiving a message from a person who once supporte...

item.title: IMD issues heatwave alert for 12 districts in Telangana; warm nights forecast in 8 districts
item.description: The India Meteorological Department (IMD) has issued a heatwave warning for Sunday across 12 districts of Telangana, indicating the likelihood of severe hot weather conditions in isolated pockets. The...

item.title: Iheanacho on target as Celtic seal Scottish Cup to complete domestic double
item.description: Kelechi Iheanacho played a key role as Celtic wrapped up a successful season by winning the Scottish Cup, completing a domestic double. The final took place at Hampden Park, where Celtic defeated Dunf...

item.title: Orlando Pirates clinch 2025/26 Premiership title after 14-year drought with win over Orbit College
item.description: Orlando Pirates have finally ended their 14-year wait for the Premiership title after securing a decisive 2-0 victory over Orbit College at Mbombela Stadium. The result confirmed Pirates as champions ...

item.title: Zanzibar lawmakers call for review of tourism strategies to strengthen sector performance
item.description: Members of the Zanzibar House of Representatives have called for a major review of the current strategies used to promote the tourism sector, saying that despite ongoing government efforts, the indust...

item.title: Spotify and Universal Music sign licensing deal allowing fans to create AI-generated covers and remixes of songs
item.description: Spotify and Universal Music Group (UMG) have announced a new licensing partnership that will allow fans to create AI-generated covers and remixes of selected songs by participating artists. Revealed d...

item.title: Traders urge government to cut turnover tax to 0.5pc ahead of budget
item.description: A coalition of traders in Pakistan has called on the federal government to reduce the proposed turnover tax rate to 0.5 per cent ahead of the upcoming national budget. Speaking at a press conference i...

item.title: Keir Starmer urges free-to-air access for Champions League final in the UK
item.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer has publicly urged broadcaster TNT Sports to make the upcoming UEFA Champions League final freely available to viewers across the United Kingdom, arguing that it sh...

item.title: Book review of ‘Yesteryear’: examining tradwife culture, time travel, and gender politics in a viral novel
item.description: This article is a review of Caro Claire Burke’s debut novel ‘Yesteryear’, a viral literary work that blends satire, dystopian fiction, and social commentary. The story follows Natalie Heller Mills, a ...

item.title: Wildfire ignites in Rock Ridge area of Maple Ridge, B.C., prompting overnight firefighting efforts
item.description: A brush fire broke out on Friday evening in the Rock Ridge neighbourhood of Maple Ridge, British Columbia, prompting a significant emergency response from local fire crews. According to the Maple Ridg...

item.title: Surveys show declining Republican confidence in Trump’s handling of the economy
item.description: Recent polling and survey data suggest that Republican voters are beginning to show reduced confidence in President Donald Trump’s handling of the economy, an issue that has historically remained one ...

item.title: Orlando Pirates clinch Premiership title after 14-year drought with decisive win over Orbit College
item.description: Orlando Pirates have finally ended a 14-year wait for the Premiership title after securing a 2-0 victory over Orbit College at Mbombela Stadium. The result, confirmed on the final day of the season, s...

item.title: Dispute grows over Katie Price’s claims about husband Lee Andrews as friends and family question his disappearance story
item.description: The article focuses on the ongoing controversy surrounding television personality Katie Price and her husband Lee Andrews, following claims that he had been kidnapped while in Dubai. According to repo...

item.title: Linux kernel vulnerability enables local privilege escalation via ptrace and pidfd_getfd flaw
item.description: Security researchers at Qualys Threat Research Unit have disclosed a serious vulnerability in the Linux kernel that allows local, unprivileged users to escalate privileges to root on affected systems....

item.title: US considers possible renewed military strikes amid ongoing tensions with Iran and fragile ceasefire
item.description: According to reporting from The Independent, tensions between the United States and Iran remain high as the Trump administration is reportedly preparing for the possibility of a new round of military ...

item.title: Nansledan development divides opinion over the future of Newquay’s high street
item.description: The article examines the growing debate surrounding Nansledan, a major development on the outskirts of Newquay in Cornwall backed by the Duchy of Cornwall and originally launched by King Charles in 20...

item.title: Well-wisher steps in to support young street vendor girl to return to school after emotional encounter
item.description: A heartwarming incident unfolded at an event hosted by Pastor Wilson Bugembe, where a young girl who was selling boiled eggs to make a living experienced a life-changing moment. According to reports, ...

item.title: ADC Picks Idris Durkwa as Consensus Candidate for Borno South Senate Seat in 2027
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) don officially choose Idris Gatumbwa Mamman Durkwa as the party consensus candidate for Borno South Senatorial District ahead of the 2027 general election. Durkwa...
